title: drawCurve (PVector start, int freedom, StrokeStyle strokeStyle)
content_html:
drawCurve (PVector start, int freedom, StrokeStyle strokeStyle)

drawCurve (PVector start, int freedom, StrokeStyle strokeStyle)

draws a Bezier curve, geometry derived from the parameters. returns a BezierCurve object variable containing the control points etc

parameters

**start** - the start point of the curve **freedom** **-** how the curve is constrained to a boundary, defined in [[defineCurve (PVector start, int freedom, int direction)]] **strokeStyle** - what the curve looks like:

strokeStyle.media:

  • ink
  • pencil strokeStyle.weight:
  • light
  • medium
  • bold

The drawCurve function implements strokeStyle as follows:

strokeStyle.media maps to which drawCurve_ function(s) should be used to draw the curve, and what inkOptions to use. strokeStyle.weight maps to lineOptions.lineWidth (and potentially inkOptions if a mapping can be defined)

media maps to a createLine_ function (or a combination) weight maps to lineOptions (width) and inkOptions (
